title: CORE_NYRA_OMNI_360_CORTEX_LOCAL_EXTENSION_2026-07-09.md
text:
# CORE_NYRA_OMNI_360_CORTEX_LOCAL_EXTENSION_2026-07-09

## Obiettivo
Estendere il modello `Core + Nyra 360` a tutti i rami reali del workspace locale, con:
- taxonomy/cortex graph profondo;
- profondita minima reale `20`;
- sinapsi esplicite tra rami;
- autoapprendimento solo nel perimetro governato `telemetry -> memory_distillation -> feedback_loop -> policy_reweighting -> synaptic_consolidation`;
- bridge operativo dentro i runtime Nyra principali.

## Decisione Core 2.0
- input: `tmp/core_nyra_cortex_extension_core2_input_2026_07_09.json`
- report: `reports/universal-core/codex/codex_core_decision_latest.json`
- winner: `full_registry_cortex_graph_with_nyra_learning_cycle`

## Implementazione chiusa

### Core taxonomy
- file: `services/universal-core-service/branches/branch-taxonomy.js`
- `branch_taxonomy_v2` ora nasce dal registry reale dei branch, non da una lista parziale statica.
- ogni branch riceve:
  - root `universal_cortex`
  - super-domain
  - domain
  - group
  - tier
  - branch node
  - 14 stage nodes fino a profondita `20`
- stage chain:
  - `sensory_ingest`
  - `intent_router`
  - `context_binding`
  - `rule_matrix`
  - `risk_surface`
  - `execution_planning`
  - `verification_contract`
  - `rollback_paths`
  - `telemetry_capture`
  - `memory_distillation`
  - `feedback_loop`
  - `policy_reweighting`
  - `synaptic_consolidation`
  - `terminal_action_model`

### Core registry wiring
- file: `services/universal-core-service/branches/index.js`
- `deterministicBranchTaxonomy()` ora costruisce la taxonomy dal registry completo `BRANCHES + BRANCH_GROUPS`.

### Nyra overlay e graph
- file: `universal-core-2.0/tools/nyra-branch-overlay.ts`
  - overlay dinamico da tutti i branch reali del Core locale;
  - piu 4 branch meta Nyra (`nyra_voice`, `memory_learning`, `event_audit`, `render_boundary`);
  - `overlay_model = omni_360_cortex`;
  - output arricchito con `active_group_ids`, `available_branch_count`, `taxonomy_schema_version`.
- file nuovo: `universal-core-2.0/tools/nyra-cortex-graph.ts`
  - costruisce `cortex_graph` da `deterministicBranchTaxonomy()`;
  - estrae path attivi, sinapsi attive e `learning_cycle`.

### Nyra learning
- file: `universal-core-2.0/tools/nyra-branch-learning.ts`
  - mantenuto registry esplicito sui rami gia curati;
  - aggiunto fallback inferito per tutti gli altri rami per dominio/famiglia:
    - software/codex
    - hardware/runtime
    - security/release/impact
    - learning/memory
    - beauty/analyzer/cosmetic
    - translator/marketing/suite

### Runtime Nyra integrati
- `universal-core-2.0/tools/nyra-branch-composer.ts`
- `universal-core-2.0/tools/nyra-branch-composer-shared.cjs`
- `universal-core-2.0/tools/nyra-branch-composer-shared.js`
- `universal-core-2.0/tools/nyra-communication-adapter.ts`
- `universal-core-2.0/tools/nyra-local-governance.ts`
- `universal-core-2.0/tools/nyra-text-chat-types.ts`
- `universal-core-2.0/tools/nyra-text-branch/nyra-text-types.ts`
- `universal-core-2.0/tools/nyra-text-branch/nyra-text-runtime.ts`

Nuovo comportamento:
- `read-only`, `local-governance` e `text-chat` espongono anche `cortex_graph`;
- `ui.notes` e summary line riportano profondita, branch count e fase del learning cycle;
- Nyra non resta piu su un overlay ridotto a pochi rami statici.

## Verifiche

### Syntax / load
- `node --check services/universal-core-service/branches/branch-taxonomy.js` -> OK
- `node --check services/universal-core-service/branches/index.js` -> OK
- `node --check universal-core-2.0/tools/nyra-branch-composer-shared.cjs` -> OK
- `node --check universal-core-2.0/tools/nyra-branch-composer-shared.js` -> OK
- `node --experimental-strip-types universal-core-2.0/tools/nyra-branch-overlay.ts` -> OK
- `node --experimental-strip-types universal-core-2.0/tools/nyra-cortex-graph.ts` -> OK
- `node --experimental-strip-types universal-core-2.0/tools/nyra-branch-learning.ts` -> OK

### Core taxonomy smoke
- `schema_version = branch_taxonomy_v2`
- `branch_count = 32`
- `max_depth = 20`
- `node_count = 551`
- `synapse_count = 147`
- sample terminal node `translator_marketing_governance__terminal_action_model` a depth `20`

### Nyra governance smoke
- comando:
  - `node --experimental-strip-types universal-core-2.0/tools/nyra-local-governance.ts --json --no-event "..."`
- risultato verificato:
  - `primary_branch = translator_marketing_governance`
  - `cortex_graph.max_depth = 20`
  - `cortex_graph.active_branch_count = 6`
  - `learning_cycle.current_phase = intent_router` oppure `execution_planning` a seconda del route

### Nyra read-only smoke
- `buildNyraReadOnlyCommunication(...)`:
  - `intent = ask_status`
  - `primary_branch = translator_marketing_governance`
  - `cortex_graph.max_depth = 20`

### Nyra text-chat smoke
- `runNyraTextChatTurn(...)`:
  - `primary_branch = translator_marketing_governance`
  - `cortex_graph.max_depth = 20`
  - `ui.notes` include:
    - `Rami attivi`
    - `Route`
    - `Core`
    - `Cortex`

## Limiti corretti
- questo non e addestramento pesi del modello;
- `autoapprendimento` qui significa solo:
  - telemetria locale
  - memoria distillata
  - feedback loop
  - policy reweighting
  - consolidamento governato
- nessuna promessa di autonomia generale;
- nessuna promozione Render in questo blocco.

## Prossimo passo corretto
1. allineare la stessa `branch_taxonomy_v2` nel repo Render reale del Core;
2. portare il bridge `cortex_graph` nei runtime Nyra live compatibili;
3. aggiungere seed/learning piu ricchi ramo per ramo dove oggi il fallback e ancora generico.
